name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: Collapsible section list with single or multiple expand mode, animated height transitions, and controlled/uncontrolled state.

consumption.typeImport: import type { AccordionProps, AccordionItemProps, AccordionItemData } from '@compomo/ui';

internalDependencies.note: Used internally by Accordion. No action needed — it's bundled in @compomo/ui.

multiple.description: Allow multiple items open at once.
